personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Migration Engineer | AWS / Python / SQL / Spark

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise experience across data migration, SQL engineering, Python automation, Spark/PySpark pipelines, and production data reliability. Strong background translating legacy data patterns into scalable cloud data platforms, validating migrated datasets, building reconciliation controls, and documenting hand-off criteria for business and technical stakeholders. Experienced in AWS data services, Hadoop/Hive concepts, Parquet-based data lakes, performance tuning, data quality, and operational support in regulated financial-services environments.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected Python/Pandas and PySpark-oriented telemetry data pipelines ingesting high-volume infrastructure data from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual processes with repeatable automated workflows.

Built a hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform using S3 landing patterns, AWS Glue ETL, Athena-style query access, and Redshift-oriented forecasting workloads to modernize legacy reporting and analytics flows.
Designed validation and reconciliation logic for production reporting datasets, improving confidence in transformed data used for capacity planning, executive reporting, and operational decisions.
Optimized SQL schemas, partitioning approaches, and historical-retention models to support reliable analysis of large time-series and telemetry datasets.
Documented pipeline behavior, data flows, quality checks, and operational procedures so migrated or redesigned processes could be supported by production and stakeholder teams.
Partnered with engineering, operations, and leadership stakeholders to translate business reporting needs into stable data products, dashboards, and recurring decision-support datasets.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic monitoring data to produce actionable performance insights for high-visibility hospitality systems.
Integrated monitoring and performance datasets from Dynatrace AppMon, Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, and related tooling to support engineering analysis and stakeholder reporting.
Supported AWS migration planning by assessing application monitoring readiness, data collection needs, and operational visibility requirements for migrated workloads.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts that automated weekly performance reporting from enterprise APM environments, replacing manual export workflows.
Supported large-scale enterprise monitoring environments with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000-6,000 instrumented agents, emphasizing reliability, standardization, and production supportability.
Created dashboards, alert thresholds, technical documentation, and operational standards adopted by customer teams for performance and availability analysis.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving transaction integrity and sub-second query behavior.
Automated schema conversion and data validation pipelines to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets during phased cutover.
Optimized C++/OCCI and SQL data access patterns to reduce hardware footprint while maintaining high-volume production performance.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported high-availability billing interfaces using C, C++, Pro*C, PL/SQL, XML, Korn Shell, and UNIX across telecom-scale production systems.
Improved database and batch-processing performance through SQL, PL/SQL, sequence optimization, memory reduction, and automated operational scripts.
Reverse-engineered undocumented vendor APIs and documented integration behavior to support maintainable interface migration and production troubleshooting.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, Java, C++, Perl, Korn Shell, XML, JSON

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed an AWS data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark-oriented processing, with emphasis on Parquet storage, small-file mitigation, query optimization, and governed data access for analytics and AI use cases.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting and analytics pipeline over telemetry datasets, emphasizing repeatable ingestion, validation, transformation, dashboarding, and stakeholder-ready reporting.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an agentic automation pipeline with semantic duplicate detection, JSON artifact generation, quality gates, and application tracking, demonstrating practical RAG-style retrieval, validation, and reproducible workflow design.
